name: Gummy Jump 2
short_description: you just climbed out of the machine only to realize it's a lot bigger then you imagined, you meet an older gummy that seems familiar, there are enemies trying to track you down, find collectibles, use the furnaces to melt the robots and consume the gummy bear enemies.
detailed_description:
You just emerged from the depths of the colossal machine, only to find that its vastness far exceeds your wildest imagination. The metallic walls tower over you, casting long shadows that shift ominously as you explore your surroundings. As you take in the intricate machinery around you

However, time is not on your side. you must act swiftly and decisively. Scattered throughout the environment are hidden collectibles that can aid you in your quest for survival. Each item you find could provide crucial advantages in your battles ahead.

As you progress, the tension mounts, culminating in an epic boss fight that will determine your fate. Will you harness the knowledge from the items you’ve collected to emerge victorious, or will you fall to the relentless foe that pursues you? In this treacherous world, every choice matters, and survival is just the beginning of your journey.
